name: onboarding flow: select timezone, pairs, notification, complete

payload.text:
First, what's your timezone?
This helps me send signals at the right time for you.

Timezone set to UTC.

Now select the pairs you want signals for:

Great choices!

When should I send you signals?

You're all set!

I'll send you signals for EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY, AUD/USD, USD/CHF, USD/CAD, NZD/USD during all trading hours.

Tap a button below to explore.

name: /start shows main menu for returning subscribed users

payload.text:
👋 Welcome to Forex Signals!

I deliver algorithmic trading signals straight to your chat. Tap a button to get started.
